_comment: To edit a bundle: change name, subtitle, plantIds (must match product 'id' fields), price, or saveText. To add a bundle, copy one object and add it to the list.
name: First Wish
description: Three friends that thrive on gentle neglect. Perfect for new plant parents or anyone who travels often.

name: Second Wish
description: A trio that works quietly in the background, cleaning your air and softening every room they're in.

name: Third Wish
description: Three large, statement plants that together transform an empty corner into a lush, editorial moment.

name: Collector's Wish
description: Three of the most sought-after collector plants, united. For those whose jungle must be extraordinary.
